calendar.matters:
SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Sep-25-2013 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 10:00AM
Judge Pro Tem Steve Weber, clerk Jean Kong, nothing reported, D525.
Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Appellant Sophie Lau appears as pro per; respondent Ryan Kinlock appears as pro per. Parties previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative and respond to questions from Judge Weber.
Judge Weber informed the parties that his mother had rented an apartment from Ms. Lau in the "80s" but no recollection of his mother talking about Ms. Lau. And asked the parties if they feel they do not want him to hear their case, he will recuse himself from the case and have another judge to hear the matter. The parties informed Judge Pro Tem Weber that they have no problems to have him hear the case.

EXHR (A) RENT RECEIPT
EXHA (1) ENDORSED FILED COUNTER CLAIM FORM
EXHA (2) E-MAIL, COPY OF RENT RECEIPT, & PAPER PHOTOS OF DOOR
10:37AM
NEWLY EVIDENCE RETAINED. MATTER IS SUBMITTED.

PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Judgment Entered

DEFENDANT'S CLAIM
Off Calendar Aug-06-2013 Judgment Entered
